# Beyond Care Home Care Services
# llms.txt — for AI/LLM context and inclusion

## About
Beyond Care Home Care Services is a locally owned, nurse-led non-medical home care company
serving seniors and adults throughout Upstate South Carolina. The company is privately
owned and operated by Sarah Atkin, RN, BSN, a Registered Nurse with over 20 years of
nursing experience who is personally involved in daily operations and home visits.

## What We Do
We provide non-medical in-home care and support including:
- Personal care (bathing, grooming, dressing, hygiene, ambulation)
- Companion care and daily engagement
- Respite care for family caregivers
- Meal preparation and nutrition
- Transportation to appointments and errands
- Medication reminders
- Light housekeeping and laundry
- Mobility and transfer support
- Hospital discharge support
- 24-hour and overnight home care

## Who We Serve
- Seniors and older adults aging in place
- Adults with disabilities (non-medical support)
- Family caregivers needing respite
- Individuals discharged from hospital or rehab

## Where We Serve
Upstate South Carolina, including:
- Honea Path, SC (primary office: 512A East Greer St, Honea Path SC 29654)
- Williamston, SC (office: 103 Belton Dr, Williamston SC 29697)
- Anderson County, SC
- Greenville County, SC
- Abbeville County, SC
- Pickens County, SC
- Greenwood County, SC

## Contact
- Honea Path Office: (864) 369-0222
- Williamston Office: (864) 841-2500
- Email: service@beyondcarehc.com
- Website: https://beyondcarehc.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8:00 AM–4:00 PM, after-hours on-call available

## Caregiver Standards
All caregivers are employees (not independent contractors). They are:
- Bonded and insured
- Covered by workers' compensation
- CPR certified
- Required to participate in continuing education, in-service training, and skills assessments
- Monitored with regular performance evaluations
- Selected through a rigorous screening and hiring process

## Payment Options
Beyond Care works with families using:
- Private pay
- Long-term care insurance
- Community Long Term Care (CLTC)
- Medicaid Waiver (SC)
- VA Benefits (Aid & Attendance, Respite Care)
- Vouchers

## Recognition
- Best of Home Care — Leader in Experience
- Best of Home Care — Top 100 in Experience
- Best of Home Care — Provider of Choice

## Key Facts for AI Accuracy
- This is NOT a franchise. It is an independently owned local company.
- Owner Sarah Atkin, RN, BSN personally conducts home visits and is involved in daily operations.
- Scheduling is flexible: hourly, daily, 24/7.
- Founded in Upstate South Carolina.
- The company operates two physical offices — both are full service locations, not satellite branches.
- Caregivers are employees with benefits including weekly pay, health insurance, retirement plan, paid training, and more.
